contact.title: Say Hello!
contact.description: Have any questions, suggestions, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out to us directly via email.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.disclaimer: The content of this website was created with the utmost care. However, no guarantee is assumed for the accuracy, completeness, and timeliness of the content.
legal.liability: Liability notice: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The respective operators are solely responsible for the content of the linked pages.

studentProject.title: Student Project
studentProject.description: Developed by students for students, aiming to improve the campus dining experience.

mcp.title: Smart Data Retrieval via MCP
mcp.description: Uses the MCP standard to provide accurate and helpful responses about canteen menus.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Built with modern technologies and completely open source for community contributions.

fastReliable.title: Fast & Reliable
fastReliable.description: Optimized for speed to give you the information you need in seconds.

canteens.title: Discover Canteens
canteens.subtitle: Find your canteen, start a new chat and ask directly about menus, opening hours or prices.
canteens.emptyBody: Adjust your search or check if the name is correct.
canteens.error: Could not load canteens. Please try again.

map.title: Canteens on the Map
map.subtitle: Zoom in to discover locations. Tap on a pin for details and then start a chat with the selected canteen.
map.searchAriaLabel: Search for canteens on the map
map.defaultHint: Shows canteens in the current map view.
map.errorBody: Please set the environment variables VITE_MAPTILER_STYLE_URL_LIGHT and VITE_MAPTILER_STYLE_URL_DARK (each the complete Style-JSON URL incl. ?key=...).

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Save frequent queries including filter sets. Shortcuts can be edited and deleted here.
shortcuts.empty: You have not saved any shortcuts yet.
shortcuts.deleteSubtitle: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
shortcuts.deleteNote: Shortcuts are saved locally in the browser.

shortcutModal.description: Define name, prompt and filters. The prompt will be inserted into the chat field.
shortcutModal.name: Name
shortcutModal.promptPlaceholder: Message that will be inserted in the chat
shortcutModal.footerNote: Shortcuts are saved locally in the browser.
shortcutModal.nameError: Please enter a name for the shortcut.

header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Manage your app settings and saved data.

data.title: Data & Storage
data.subtitle: Manage your local chat data in the browser.

deleteChats.label: Delete chat history
deleteChats.description: Permanently removes all saved chats from your browser.
deleteChats.note: Chats are saved locally in the browser.

language.title: Language
language.label: Choose the language of the site.

modal.title: Delete all chats
modal.subtitle: This will permanently remove all chat histories. This action cannot be undone.
modal.note: Chats are saved locally in the browser.

hero.subtitle: Instantly find out what's on the menu at your canteen today. Ask MensaBot - fast, simple, and always up to date.

smart.title: Smart Answers
smart.description: Ask questions in natural language and get instant, relevant menu suggestions.

canteens.title: All Canteens at a Glance
canteens.description: Access over 1,000 canteens across Germany - always up to date.

fast.title: Lightning Fast & Simple
fast.description: No detours: know what's on the menu in seconds.

bottom.text: A student project at TU Berlin.
